releaseNotes:
- Refined Mariana & Light themes + custom TextMate theme
- Find in Files + PC-style Find/Replace (Ctrl+F, Ctrl+H, Ctrl+Shift+F)
- Git: panel, clone (incl. cherry-pick & submodules), branches, commit/push/pull/fetch, file status colors
- New color picker
- Refreshed UI icons
- Smoother, keyboard-safe dialogs
- Editor fixes: caret clamp crash, highlighting bar, drawer input freeze
